panels.description: Wide panoramic landscape shot. A massive, undulating line of soldiers marching across a desolate, dusty plain, resembling a serpentine rope, under a grim, overcast sky.

bubbles.text: See our line across the plain, Like a heel-rope bent again, Reaching, writhing, rolling far, Sweeping all away to war!

panels.description: Medium shot of a group of weary men trudging beside the soldiers. They look dusty, exhausted, and hollow-eyed, staring blankly ahead in the chaos.

bubbles.text: While the men that walk beside, dusty, silent, heavy-eyed, cannot tell why we or they...

panels.description: Medium close-up of a small child in the camp, carrying a heavy, oversized bundle on their back, expression of numb resignation. Camp background in soft focus.

bubbles.text: March and suffer day by day. Children of the Camp are we, Serving each in his degree;

panels.description: Close-up shot of a pair of children's hands tightening a heavy leather harness, emphasizing the rough textures of the ropes and packs. Harsh, dramatic lighting.

bubbles.text: Children of the yoke and goad, Pack and harness, pad and load!
